Hi Carlos. How was your verification visit last week?
Hi Emma. It was good. I arrived early and the producer gave me a warm welcome.
Good. What did you check first?
First, I checked the documents. Everything was correct.
Did you speak with the producer?
Yes, I spoke with the manager and I took some photos of the boundary.
And did you find any problems?
I found two small problems, but the farm did not have any critical issues. I recorded everything.

Let me tell you about my last verification visit. Last week, I visited a coffee farm near Varginha. I arrived early in the morning, and the producer gave me a warm welcome. First, I checked the registration documents, and everything was correct. Then I walked around the property. I saw the two storage areas and the processing unit. I spoke with the farm manager about the harvest, and I took some photos of the boundary. In the afternoon, I recorded my findings in the system. I found two small problems, but the farm did not have any critical issues. It was a good and productive visit.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma. Thank you for your field note about the last visit. I read it this morning, and it was very clear. I saw that you arrived early and checked all the documents. Good job. I have two questions for you. What did you find in the storage areas? And did the producer sign the corrective action plan? Please send me the answers before Friday. I also spoke with my manager, and she liked your report. Thank you for the good work, Carlos. Talk soon.

First, last week I visited a coffee farm and arrived early in the morning. Then the producer gave me a warm welcome. Next, I saw the storage areas and spoke with the manager. After that, I took some photos of the boundary. Finally, I recorded my findings, and the farm did not have any critical issues.
